messages.subject: Q2 hiring plan review
messages.snippet: Can you confirm the hiring plan before Thursday's meeting?
messages.bodyPreview: We need a fast call on engineering headcount. Please send your updated recommendation and any open risks.

messages.subject: Re: Q2 hiring plan review
messages.snippet: I can send the updated plan this afternoon.
messages.bodyPreview: I am tightening the hiring plan and will send the updated recommendation, including tradeoffs, later today.

messages.subject: Customer renewal contract
messages.snippet: Waiting on legal approval before we can sign.
messages.bodyPreview: We are aligned on pricing, but legal still needs to review the revised language. We expect to have an update next week.

reminders.reason: Follow up if legal has not responded
